UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF JEFFREY NEEDELMAN, ONA NEEDLEMAN (APPLICATION) TO RECONSIDER AND MODIFY OR REVOKE ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN UNDER CCP 1008. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 1005. COURT DECLINES PLAINTIFFS' SUGGESTION TO TREAT THEIR MOTION AS MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473, RAISED FOR THE FIRST TIME IN REPLY. DEFENSE COUNSEL IS TO SUBMIT AN AMENDED ORDER REGARDING THE APPEARANCE OF THE PLAINTIFF AT THE HEARING ON NOVEMBER 04, 2013. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Amended Order On Demurrer And Judgment In Favor Of Defts To First Amended Complaint Of Pltf'S
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on Friday, March 14, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFFS JEFFREY NEEDELMAN'S and ONA NEEDLEMAN'S Motion For Relief From Amended Order On Demurrer And Judgment In Favor Of Defendants To First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff is
DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Prevailing party to submit a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To Apr-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Amended Order On Demurrer And Judgment In Favor Of Defts To First Amended Complaint Of Pltf'S
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Continued To Mar-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:PLAINTIFFs JEFFREY NEEDELMAN and ONA NEEDLEMAN's Motion For Relief From Amended Order On Demurrer And Judgment In Favor Of Defendants To First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiffs is Continued to March 14, 2014 on Court's own motion. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

(Application) To Reconsider And Modify Or Revoke Order Sustaining Defs' Demur To Plfs' 1st Amended Complaint W/O Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Jeffrey A. Needelman the moving party/Attorney Aaron Shapiro for Dewolf Realty Co, Inc. the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from Plaintiff the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JEFFREY NEEDELMAN, ONA NEEDLEMAN (Application) To Reconsider And Modify Or Revoke Order Sustaining Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiffs' 1st Amended Complaint WithOut Leave To Amend is DENIED. Plaintiffs failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008. Plaintiff failed to comply with CCP 1005. Court declines Plaintiffs' suggestion to treat their motion as motion for relief under CCP 473, raised for the first time in reply.
Defense Counsel is to submit an amended order regarding the appearance of the Plaintiff at the hearing on November 04, 2013. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aaron Place Shapiro, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, (415-394-3612), for Dewolf Realty Co., Inc., Defendants and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiffs and Opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC., M&H L.P. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Aaron P. Shapiro for Defendant Dewolf Realty Co., Inc. the moving party/ Plaintiff Jeffrey A, Needleman the opposing party.
Discussions held in DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC., M&H L.P.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. The Court continues this matter until November 06, 2013 for Plaintiff to receive copy of reply. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Court adopts the tenative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC., M&H L.P.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiffs shall file an amended complaint within 10 days of service of entry of order. Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC. and M&H L.P.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey Allen Needelman, plaintiff appearing on hiw own behalf;
No other appearance.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC. and M&H L.P.'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court to be heard on September 11, 2013, at 9:30 a.m. See SF Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
